---
title: "<center> Research </center>"
pagetitle: Research
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```


<br> 

### Policy Writing

- “Invisible Entrepreneurs: Understanding the market landscape and enterprise readiness for women-led home-based businesses in Tamil Nadu and Rajasthan,” IWWAGE, 2020 [[Link]](https://iwwage.org/wp-content/uploads/2021/01/IWWAGE_LEAD_report.pdf)

- “Business Readiness Scorecard for Women” IWWAGE, 2020 [[Link]](https://iwwage.org/wp-content/uploads/2020/08/business-Readiness-Scorecard.pdf)

- “Women Entrepreneurs as the Powerhouse of Recovery,” LEAD (pg16-20), 2020 [[Link]](https://ifmrlead.org/wp-content/uploads/2020/11/Report_Women-Entrepreneurs-as-Powerhouse-of-Recovery-upd.pdf)

- “Youth Solutions Report”, United Nations Sustainable Development Solutions Network [[Link
]](https://www.undp.org/sites/g/files/zskgke326/files/publications/UNDP-RBAP-SDSN-joint-report-Youth-Solutions-Report-2020.pdf)

- “Moving the needle from subsistence to growth for home-based businesses,” IWWAGE, [[Link]](https://iwwage.org/moving-the-needle-from-subsistence-to-growth-for-home-based-businesses/)

- “Invisible Entrepreneurs: How to empower women behind their craft”, AVPN blog, 2021 [[Link]](https://avpn.asia/blog/invisible-entrepreneurs-empower-women-behind-craft/)



<br>
